summary: Iteration 15 - Humaniser Overhaul Testing. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. POST /api/humanise returns all 8 required fields: whyThisMatters, original, humanised, changesTable, aiDetectionRiskAreas, voiceReflectionQuestions, academicEnquiryPrompt, integrityReminder. Frontend Humaniser page at /humaniser has neuroaffirming intro banner, PDF upload, text input, guided tour, and displays all output sections correctly.

issues: Minor React warning: 'Cannot update component while rendering' - cosmetic, not functional

POST /api/humanise changesTable has 4-8 entries with originalPhrase, humanisedVersion, reason

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/humanise correctly implements neuroaffirming philosophy with whyThisMatters field
HumaniserRequest model properly accepts text field
Humaniser response includes all 8 required fields as per specification
changesTable includes originalPhrase, humanisedVersion, reason with specific explanations (passive/active voice, sentence rhythm, etc.)
aiDetectionRiskAreas includes pattern and explanation framed as 'This pattern appears in your writing...'
voiceReflectionQuestions includes exactly 3 Socratic questions for metacognitive awareness
academicEnquiryPrompt asks about the IDEAS in the text, not about style
integrityReminder includes appropriate academic integrity message
Humaniser.js correctly implements all output sections with proper data-testid attributes

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 complete. Humaniser overhaul tested. POST /api/humanise accepts text field and returns 8 fields: whyThisMatters (neuroaffirming message), original (input text), humanised (rewritten text with arrow markers), changesTable (4-8 entries with originalPhrase/humanisedVersion/reason), aiDetectionRiskAreas (2-3 entries with pattern/explanation), voiceReflectionQuestions (exactly 3 Socratic questions), academicEnquiryPrompt (question about IDEAS), integrityReminder (academic integrity message). Frontend at /humaniser has PDF upload, text input, guided tour, and displays all output sections with proper data-testid attributes. LLM calls take 20-40 seconds. Cookie-based auth working.
